calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jonathan Seigel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, GIAMPAOLO BOSCHETTI.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PETER DAVID OGILVIE, aka PETER DAVID OGILVE, and SARA TAM OBILVIE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- dismissed.
Plaintiff Giampaolo Boschetti sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
The following Exhibits were introduce by the Plaintiff and marked as follows:
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1. Corporation Grant Deed/Evidence.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2. Grant Deed/Evidence.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 3. Deed of Trust/Evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
1. As of March 19, 2013, Plaintiff GIAMPAOLO BOSCHETTI was the sole owner of the real property legally described in Exhibit 1 and commonly know as 166-180 Golden Gate Avenue, San Francisco, California (the "Property").

2. Defendants PETER DAVID OBILVIE aka PETER DAVID OGILVE; SARA TAM OGILVIE own no right, title, estate, interest, or lien, whaterver, in the Property.

3. The Deed of Trust recorded with the San Francisco Recorders Office on September 18, 2013 as Intstrument No. 2013-J757802-00 is deemend void ab inition and cancelled.

4. Plaintiff may recover costs against Defendants pursuant to a cost bill.

Court signed Judgment in open court.
Court ordered Exhibits returned to counsel for the care and custody of the court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
